docTitle: Bible ku Kaadi ka Buloba · Bible mu Muvungu Umue
metaDesc: Landa tshikondo tshia Dipungilu Dikulukulu, muoyo wa Yesu, ne ngendu ya Paulo pa kaadi ka buloba ka bushuwa — Bible wakenzeka mu miaba ya bushuwa.

s.kicker: Bible mu Muvungu Umue · Makaadi a Buloba
s.title: Bible ku Kaadi ka Buloba
s.verse: “Bualu bua tuetu katuakalonda nsumuinu yakambabo ku budimu bua bantu hatuakanumanyisha bua bukole ne bua dilua bia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, kadi tuetu tuakadi bamonyi ba butumbi buandi ku mesu etu.” (2 Petelo 1:16)
s.purpose: Bible ki ndipambuka to. Mmukanda wa malu a bantu bakendakana mu miaba ya bushuwa, mu matuku ne mena a bushuwa. Landa njila eyi pa kaadi ka buloba, mu bulongame bua matuku — pesa ku tshikoji, anyi ofila ▶ bua kwendela mu muyuki mutalu ku mutalu.
s.ot_kick: ① Dipungilu Dikulukulu — munkatshi mua matuku
s.ot_h: Kubangila ku difuka too ne ku dipingana ku Yelushalema
s.ot_lead: Ki ngendu umue to, kadi diendela dia muyuki wa lusungu kubangila ku difuka: difuka ne dipona → mvula munene ne Babele → dibikila (Abalahama) → buloba buvua bulaya → Dipatuka → tshihela → dikuata → bukelenge → butshibuka → bupika → dipingana.
s.je_kick: ② Dipungilu Dihia — muoyo wa Yesu
s.je_h: Kubangila ku Beteleheme too ne ku Yelushalema
s.je_lead: Landa muoyo wa Yesu bu mudi Malumu Luimpe amba, mu bulongame — kubangila ku diledibua diandi mu Beteleheme, kupitshila ku dibatijibua diandi ne mudimu wa mu Galela, kupitshila mu Samalea, too ne ku mutshi mutshiamakane, dibika ne dibanda ku diulu mu Yelushalema.
s.pa_kick: ③ Dipungilu Dihia — ngendu ya Paulo
s.pa_h: Kubangila ku Antiokia too ne ku mfudilu kua buloba — Lomo
s.pa_lead: Kubangila ku Pentekoste mu Yelushalema, mushindu uvua lumu luimpe lutangalaka kupita Yudaya — kupitshila mu Asia Mukese ne Elopa too ne ku tshia ku mutshima tshia bukokeshi. Sungula ngendu umue wa ku itanu (wa 1·wa 2·wa 3 + ngendu ku Lomo + kunyima kua kuhandulula) ne landa malu a mu Bienzedi ne mikanda yakafundibua mu njila.
s.foot: Bimfuminu · Miaba idi ilonda mêyi a Bible ne jeografi wa Bible (ne mena a lelu muaba udi akuatshisha). Mikalu ya mbuu, misulu ne dishiba bidi bifumina ku malu a jeografi apatuka patoke (Natural Earth), mimpepejibue.

eden.name: Edene (Difuka · Dipona)
eden.today: tshitunga tshia misulu Tigilise ne Efalate lelu
eden.note: Mu buloba buvua bufukibue buimpe bikole, bubi budi bubuela ne budi butshibula diumvuangana dia Nzambi ne bantu.
events: Difuka mu matuku asamba — “buimpe bikole”
Muntu mufuka mu tshimfuanyi tshia Nzambi
Dipona, ne dihatudibua mu Edene
Mulayi wa kumpala wa lumu luimpe — “muana wa mukashi neakume ku mutu kua nyoka”

noah.name: Alalata (Mvula Munene)
noah.today: Mukuna wa Alalata, ku esete kua Tuluki lelu
noah.note: Nzambi udi ulumbuluisha buloba buule tente ne bubi, kadi udi ulama muoyo ku dîku dimue.
events: Buloba buule tente ne bubi
Mvula Munene, ne buatu bua Noa
Tshipungidi tshia muanzankongolo — “mvula kayipu kubutula kabidi”

babel.name: Tshibumba tshia Babele
babel.note: Ku didisua didi difika ku diulu, Nzambi udi usankakaja miakulu yabo ne bantu ha buloba buonso.
events: “Tuyai kuasa musoko ne tshibumba tshile… tuikale ne dina dia butumbi”
Nzambi udi usankakaja miakulu yabo
Bantu badi batangalaka ha buloba (Shinâ — pashishe Babulona)

ur.name: Ula
ur.note: Muyuki wa lusungu wa Bible udi ubangila ne dibikila dia muntu umue.
events: Nzambi udi ubikila Abalama ku Ula wa Kasada
“Nenkuvuishe tshisamba tshinene… Bisamba bionso nebisanke bua bualu buebe”
Ku ditabuja udi ushiya buloba buabo

haran.name: Halana
haran.note: Mu njila, wandamuna dibikila kuya ku buloba buvua bulaya.
events: Dîku dia Tela didi dishikama ku Halana
Tela udi ufua
Abalama udi uya ku Kanana ne bidimu 75

shechem.name: Shekeme · Kanana
shechem.note: Mu buloba buvua bulaya dîku didi dijadikibua ne tshipungidi tshidi tshipita ku bikondo ne bikondo.
events: Dibuela mu Kanana, tshioshelu tshia kumpala — “Nempe tunkanunuina biebe buloba ebu”
Tshipungidi (Gen 15) · Isaka · Yakoba
Bana dikumi ne babidi ba Yakoba — muji wa bisa dikumi ne bibidi

egypt.name: Ejipitu (Goshene)
egypt.today: ku Delta wa Nile, Ejipitu lelu
egypt.note: Dîku didi dilua tshisamba tshinene — pashishe tshisamba tshia bahika.
events: Yosefe, mupanyibua, udi ubanda mu bukokeshi mu Ejipitu
Dîku dijima dia Yakoba didi dipuekela bua kunyema nzala
Tshisamba tshia Isalele tshidi tshivula tshidi tshivuishibua bahika

sinai.name: Mukuna wa Sinai
sinai.note: Lusungu lunene lua Dipungilu Dikulukulu — bahika badi balua bantu ba Nzambi.
events: Bipupu dikumi ne muana wa mukoko wa Pasaka
Mbuu Mukunze udi utabuluka, badi basabuka
Mikenshi dikumi, Mikenshi, ntenta wa dikumbi ne milambu

kadesh.name: Kadesha (tshihela)
kadesh.note: Dibenga ditabuja didi dijimija tshikondo tshimue buloba — kadi Nzambi udi ushala nabo.
events: Batentekedi dikumi ne babidi — kadi bantu badi babenga kuitabuja
Bidimu 38 mu tshihela — mana, ditu ne kapia
Mu mpata ya Moaba, muyuki wa ndekelu wa Mose (Dutelonome)

jericho.name: Yeliko
jericho.note: Ku ndekelu badi babuela ne bakuata buloba buvua bulaya.
events: Musulu wa Yadene udi utabuluka, bantu badi basabuka
Bimanu bia Yeliko bidi bipona
Dikuata dia Kanana ne dikaba dia buloba

shiloh.name: Shilo (Balumbuluishi)
shiloh.note: Pavuabo kabayi ne mukelenge, muntu yonso udi wenza muvuaye musue — mukelenge mulelela udi ne bua kulua.
events: Ntenta wa dikumbi udi utekibua ku Shilo
Tshilengelu tshia bubi–dikenga–lusungu (Debola, Gideona, Sansona)
Luta — lulamatu mu matuku a mîdima, mu dîku dia Davidi

jerusalem.name: Yelushalema · Bukelenge Buvuangane
jerusalem.note: Tshikondo tshimpe tshia Isalele — ne mulayi wa mukelenge wa tshiendelele.
events: Shaulu mukelenge wa kumpala, pashishe Davidi ne Goliata
Tshipungidi tshia Davidi — “nkuasa webe tshiendelele” (2 Samuele 7)
Solomo udi wibaka ntempelo mu Yelushalema

samaria.name: Samalea · Bukelenge Buvuatshibuka
samaria.note: Bukelenge budi butshibuka ne budi bupuekela pavua baprofete bela lubila.
events: Kunyima kua Solomo, butshibuka mu Yuda ne Isalele
Dishuena mpingu misangu ne misangu
Eliya, Yeshaya, Yelemiya badi bela ne, ‘pinganai’ — ne badi bamba bua Masiya

nineveh.name: Ninewe (Ashulu)
nineveh.note: Bapua didimuija dionso mutu, nord udi upona kumpala.
events: Ninewe, tshimenga tshinene tshia Ashulu
Bukelenge bua nord budi bupona kudi Ashulu (722 KKY)
Yona udi utumibua ku Ninewe

babylon.name: Babulona
babylon.note: Butuku bukole kupita yonso — kadi mulayi wa dilongolodibua udi ushala.
events: Yelushalema udi upona, ntempelo udi uhia (586 KKY)
Yuda udi uhangibua ku Babulona
Danyele ne Ezekiele — ditabuja ne bikena bia Nzambi mu bupika

susa.name: Shushana (Pelesia)
susa.note: Nansha ku tshia ku mutshima tshia bukokeshi bua bena mpingu, Nzambi udi ulama bantu bandi.
events: Pelesia udi utshimuna Babulona
Estere udi usungila Bena Yuda ku dibutudibua
Nehemiya udi usambila ku mpala kua mukelenge, udi utumibua

return.name: Dipingana ku Yelushalema
return.note: Badi bapingana ne wibaka kabidi — kadi kakuena mukelenge mulue. Badi bindila Masiya.
events: Tubita tusatu tua dipingana ku dîyi dia Kulosa (Zelubabele 538 · Esela 458 · Nehemiya 444)
Ntempelo mwibakibue kabidi ne bimanu bia Yelushalema bilongolobue
Malaki — Dipungilu Dikulukulu didi dijika: “ndi ntuma messager wanyi”

bethlehem.name: Beteleheme
bethlehem.note: Masiya muvuabo balaya udi ulua ku musoko wa Davidi — “Dî diakakudimuka muntu”.
events: Muledibue mu Beteleheme, musoko wa Davidi
Banjelu badi bamanyisha balami ba mikoko lumu
Bena Meshi badi balua kutendelela

nazareth.name: Nazaleta
nazareth.note: Nzambi udi ukola bu muntu mu musoko wa tshianana.
events: Mukoleshibue mu nzubu wa muena mudimu wa mabaya
Ne bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, ukonka ne wandamuna mu ntempelo
Pashishe ubengibua mu nsunagoga wa musoko wabo

jordan.name: Musulu wa Yadene
jordan.today: musulu wa Yadene wa muinshi lelu
jordan.note: Mudimu wandi wa patoke udi ubanga — diulu didi dimuleja bu Muana.
events: Ubatijibua kudi Yone
Nyuma udi uhueka bu nkutshi — “Eu udi Muana wanyi munanga”
Udi utshimuna diteta disatu dia Satana mu tshihela

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Mu tshishima tshiandi tshia kumpala udi uleja butumbi buandi.
events: Muenyi ku dibaka
Mai akudimuka mvinyo — tshishima tshiandi tshia kumpala
Bayidi bandi badi bamuitabuja

sychar.name: Suka (Samalea)
sychar.note: Njila wa mudimu wa kumpala — kupitshila mu Yelushalema too ne mu Samalea mupetulula.
events: Udi ulengeja ntempelo mu Yelushalema
Butuku, Nikodemo — “udi ne bua kuledibua tshiakabidi”
Mai a muoyo bua mukashi wa mu Samalea

capernaum.name: Kapênuma
capernaum.today: ku muelelu wa dishiba dia Galela lelu
capernaum.note: Tshibangidilu tshia mudimu wa mu Galela — dibikila, dilongesha ne diluangana bidi bisangila muaba eu.
events: Udi ubikila balobi ne udi usombela muaba eu
Muyuki wa ku mukuna — “Badi bahele mu mitshima yabo badi ne disanka”
Nsumuinu ya bukelenge — ne diluangana didi dibanda

galilee.name: Dishiba dia Galela
galilee.note: Ne bukole ha mutu pa bifukibua udi uleja udiye.
events: “Hua, talala talalâ” — udi utalajija tshipupu
Udi udisha bantu 5.000 ne mampa atanu ne mishipa ibidi
Udi wenda ha mutu pa mai

caesarea_p.name: Kaisalia wa Filipoi
caesarea_p.note: Bayidi badi bajingulula ne yeye ndiye Kilisto, ne njila wa mutshi mutshiamakane udi unzuluka.
events: Ditabuja dia Petelo — “Wewe udi Kilisto, Muana wa Nzambi udi ne muoyo”
Udi wamba bua lufu ne dibika diandi tshia kumpala
Udi ushintuluka mu butumbi ha mukuna

jericho.name: Yeliko
jericho.note: Mu njila wa kubanda ku Yelushalema, udi ukeba badi bajimine.
events: Udi upesha Batimee mufofo dimona
Udi ubikila Zakê mufutshishi wa bitadi
“Muana wa muntu wakuluila bua kukeba ne bua kusungila tshidi tshijimine”

bethany.name: Betania
bethany.note: Udi uleja bukole buandi ha mutu pa lufu ku mpala kua lumingu luandi lua ndekelu.
events: Udi ubisha Lazalo mu lukita — “Meme ndi bianyi dibisha, ndi bianyi muoyo”
Malia udi umuela mafuta bua dijiibua diandi
Tshishima etshi tshidi tshikolesha meji a kumushipa

jerusalem.name: Yelushalema
jerusalem.note: Tshikoji tshinene tshidi Bible mujima uleja — mutshi mutshiamakane, dibika, ne dibanda ku diulu.
events: Dibuela dia butumbi; udi upiukula meza a mu ntempelo kabidi
Ku Didia dia Ndekelu udi wowa bayidi makasa
Udi ufuila ku mutshi mutshiamakane
Mubike ku dituku disatu, pashishe ubanda ku diulu

antioch.name: Antiokia
antioch.note: Ekeleziya wa ditumina, mudimu wa bisamba bia bende udi ubangila ne uhingana.
events: Mu disambila, Nyuma udi utantulula Banaba ne Saulo
Ekeleziya mudibo babanga kubikila bayidi ne ‘Bena Kilisto’
Tshibangidilu tshia ngendu wa kumpala, wa kabidi ne wa kasatu

seleucia.name: Seleukia
seleucia.note: Tshibuandilu tshia Antiokia — badi banangalakila ku Kupulio.

salamis.name: Salami (Kupulio)
salamis.note: Muaba wa kumpala mu Kupulio — diambila mu nsunagoga.

paphos.name: Pafo
paphos.note: Bukole budi buleshibua kudi badi baluisha lumu luimpe.
events: Elima mutempeshanganyi wa mbuku udi ukituka mufofo
Segio Paulo nguvena udi witabuja
Kubangila apa dina ‘Paulo’ ndidi ditua kumpala

perga.name: Pêge
perga.note: Tshibuandilu mu Pampulia — muaba eu Yone Mâko udi uhingana.

pantioch.name: Antiokia wa mu Pisidia
pantioch.note: Lumu luimpe ludi lunzuluka kudi bisamba bia bende.
events: Muyuki mule wa muyuki wa lusungu mu nsunagoga
Bisamba bia bende ba bungi badi basanka ne baitaba dî
Bahangibua kudi baluishi

iconium.name: Ikonio
iconium.note: Ba bungi badi bitabuja, kadi dikengeshibua didi dibavuisha kuya kumpala.

lystra.name: Luseta
lystra.note: Babikilabo bu nzambi, pashishe bamuasa mabue.
events: Udi wondopa muntu wakadi tshilema kubangila ku diledibua
Tshisumbu tshia bantu tshidi tshikeba kubalambuila bu banzambi
Bamuasa mabue ne bamushiya bu mufue, kadi udi ujuka

derbe.name: Dêbe
derbe.note: Badi benza bayidi ba bungi; badi bapingana bua kukolesha ekeleziya.

troas.name: Toa
troas.note: Muaba wa dishintuluka mudi lumu luimpe lubanga kuya ku Elopa.
events: Tshikena tshia muntu wa ku Makedonia
“Lua biebe mu Makedonia, utukuatshishe”
Badi basabuka diakamue ku Elopa

philippi.name: Filipoi
philippi.note: Ekeleziya wa kumpala wa Elopa — lumu luimpe ludi lutshimuna nansha mu buloko.
events: Lidia, musumbishi wa bilamba bia mputa, udi witabuja
Muhika mukaji uvua umanya kutentekela udi uhanduludibua
Nyimbu ya munkatshi mua butuku, dikankamana dia buloba, dîku dia mulami wa buloko disungidibua

thess.name: Tesalonike
thess.note: Dî didi dinyunga musoko ne diluangana didi dibanda.
events: Udi wakula mu nsunagoga matuku a Sabato asatu
“Bantu aba bakamana kutombuesha bonso ba ha buloba”
Badi baya butuku

berea.name: Beloya
berea.note: Bantu ba mitshima mimpe bakadikeba dî bobo nkayabo.
events: Badi baitaba dî ne muoyo mumpe
Dituku dionso badi bakonkonona Mifundu bua kutentekela
Ba bungi badi bitabuja

athens.name: Atena
athens.note: Mu musoko wa bena meji, udi wambila bua ‘nzambi kayi mumanyike’.
events: Mutshima wandi udi utata bua musoko muule tente ne mpingu
Ku Aleopago udi wambila bua Mufuki ne dibika dia bafue
Bamuseka, kadi bantu bakese badi bitabuja

corinth.name: Kolinto
corinth.note: Udi ushala tshidimu ne tshitupa, ukunyina ekeleziya mu musoko wa masandi.
events: Udi wenza ntenta ne Akula ne Pisila
Nzambi udi umukolesha — “meme udi nʼebe”
Bena Kolinto ba bungi badi bitabuja ne babatijibua

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Tshia ku mutshima tshia ngendu wa kasatu — dî didi ditangalaka mu Asia.
events: Dilongesha dia matuku onso munkatshi mua bidimu bibidi mu nzubu wa Tulano
Mikanda ya manga yakuoshibua; midimu ya bukole
Demetleo mufudi wa arjenti udi ujula tshiyongolo

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Dishiya dia tshinyongolo ne bakulu ba Efeso.
events: “Nudishe ekelesia wa Mukelenge wakasumbeye ku mashi andi”
Bakulu badi badila, bamanya ne kabakumumona kabidi

caesarea.name: Kaisalia
caesarea.today: ku muelelu wa mbuu wa Isalele lelu
caesarea.note: Munkatshi mua bidimu bibidi udi wakuila lumu luimpe ku mpala kua nguvena ne mukelenge.
events: Dilumbuluibua ku mpala kua nguvena Felikise ne Festo
Diakuila diandi ku mpala kua mukelenge Agipa
“Ndi ndayidila kudi Kaisa” — kuya ku Lomo

jerusalem.name: Yelushalema
jerusalem.note: Bamukuata mu ntempelo, njila wandi bu muena buloko udi ubangila.
events: Tshisumbu tshia bantu tshidi tshimukuata mu ntempelo
Udi wakuila ku mpala kua tshiadilu
Bu muena tshimenga wa Loma, batumibua ne balami ku Kaisalia

myra.name: Mula
myra.note: Badi babuela mu buatu bua ku Alekasandia buvua buya ku Lomo.

fairhaven.name: Dilobo Dimpe (Kulete)
fairhaven.note: Didimuija dia Paulo dia kulekela kuenda mu mai kabayi bateleja.

crete.name: Kulete
crete.note: Kunyima kua kuhanduludibua, tshisenga mudiye ushiya Tito bua kulongolola ekeleziya.
events: Udi ushiya Tito bua kusunguisha bakulu ku musoko ne ku musoko
Udi ulomba balombodi bakayi ne tshilema, ba lulamatu
Udi ufunda mukanda wa Tito

malta.name: Melita
malta.note: Munkatshi mua tshipupu ne dishimbakana dia buatu, mulayi wa Nzambi udi ushala.
events: Luhehele lukole ludi lushimbakaja buatu, kadi bantu bonso 276 badi bahanduka
Nyoka udi umusuma, kadi kena umvua bibi
Udi wondopa basama ba mu tshisenga

syracuse.name: Sulakusa
syracuse.note: Badi bashala matuku asatu mu Sikili.

puteoli.name: Potiolo
puteoli.note: Badi bafika mu Italia ne bana babo ba mu Kilisto badi babakumbana.

rome.name: Lomo
rome.book: Bienzedi 28 · Mikanda ya mu Buloko · 2 Timote
rome.note: Lumu luimpe ludi lufika ku tshia ku mutshima tshia bukokeshi ku ndekelu — ki nkujika to, kadi tshibangidilu.
events: Bidimu bibidi mushikame mu nzubu ne mulami, wambila bua bukelenge bua Nzambi ne dikima
Kubangila apa udi ufunda Mikanda ya mu Buloko (Efeso·Filipoi·Kolosai·Filemona)
Pashishe bamukuata mu buloko kabidi, udi ufunda 2 Timote ne udi ushipibua bua ditabuja — “Nakuluangana nvita mimpe, nakushikisha tshidikishilu tshia lubilu”

journeys.j5: Ngendu wa katanu · kunyima kua kuhandulula
